projects.title: Reusable Enterprise RAG Platform
projects.subtitle: Config-Driven Knowledge Systems for Huntington National Bank
projects.description: Built a reusable retrieval-augmented generation platform that lets teams launch new internal AI knowledge systems without rebuilding the infrastructure each time.
projects.extendedDescription: Designed generalized AWS infrastructure for recurring enterprise RAG use cases, including scheduled SharePoint ingestion, document vectorization, OpenSearch indexing, agent configuration via S3, reranked retrieval, session memory, logging, and observability with LangFuse. The platform now supports multiple internal use cases such as policy search, onboarding support, HR knowledge access, vendor capability search, and call center assistance.
projects.impact: Reduced time-to-launch for new knowledge agents by turning repeated RAG work into a reusable platform now supporting tools used by tens of thousands of colleagues.

projects.title: Customer Financial Insights + AI Chatbot
projects.subtitle: In Development: Customer-Facing AI for Mobile and Web
projects.description: Spearheading the data and AI architecture for an in-development customer-facing system that prepares personalized financial insights and future chatbot experiences for Huntington customers.
projects.extendedDescription: Leading the data preparation and AI design work for a production-oriented customer experience that aggregates customer data nightly, generates structured prompts at scale, and serves LLM-powered insights across Huntington digital channels. The architecture spans AWS data systems and GCP inference services, and includes the groundwork for future conversational features such as retrieval over financial guidance content, product knowledge, and customer-specific data analysis tools.
projects.impact: In development for large-scale customer experiences, with architecture and data pipelines being prepared for production rollout across digital banking channels.

projects.title: AI Document Processing Systems
projects.subtitle: Structured Extraction from Complex Financial Documents
projects.description: Built LLM-powered document processing workflows that turn messy, unstructured financial documents into structured outputs for downstream business use.
projects.extendedDescription: Developed multiple proof-of-concepts for document-heavy banking workflows, including loan document review and Federal Reserve report parsing. The systems use multi-step LLM orchestration to break large parsing tasks into manageable stages, extract line items and key fields from inconsistent PDFs, and produce structured outputs suitable for spreadsheet workflows and rule-based review.
projects.impact: Turned inconsistent multi-page documents into structured outputs that support faster review and downstream analysis.

projects.title: AI Enablement, Workflow Automation, and Technical Advocacy
projects.subtitle: Helping Teams Across Huntington Adopt AI Effectively
projects.description: Created practical AI workflows, reusable guidance, and presentations that help colleagues and leadership teams apply modern AI tools to everyday work.
projects.extendedDescription: Regularly teach colleagues across the bank how to use AI tools such as Microsoft Copilot effectively, present project work to audiences ranging from team meetings to leadership reviews, and create workflow designs, internal documentation, and supporting libraries that help teams adopt AI with stronger habits and clearer architecture.
projects.impact: Extended impact beyond shipped systems by helping teams across the bank understand, evaluate, and use AI tools more effectively.
